overview.text: The Australian Rail Track Corporation is a Commonwealth-owned company that manages and maintains most of the interstate standard-gauge rail network. In NSW it operates the Hunter Valley coal network and the interstate corridor, providing access to private operators.

items: Network Control Centres in Junee (NSW), Mile End (SA) and Broadmeadow (Hunter).
Inland Rail project — new Melbourne–Brisbane standard-gauge corridor.
Coordinates with NSW emergency services for level-crossing incidents and trespass.
